data.title: South Korea Introduces Guidelines for Virtual Asset Lending Services
data.description:
According to PANews, South Korea's financial regulatory authorities have introduced the first set of guidelines for virtual asset lending services. In response to increased investor risks due to intensified competition among exchanges, the regulations prohibit leverage and cash lending, set personal limits, and cap fees to prevent short-selling activities. On September 5, the Financial Services Commission announced the implementation of the self-regulatory 'Virtual Asset Lending Business Guidelines,' developed by the Financial Supervisory Service and DAXA.

The new guidelines focus on three core areas: service scope limitations, user protection, and market stability. They explicitly ban excessive leverage lending and cash lending in Korean won, requiring exchanges to use their own assets for services and prohibiting third-party delegation or indirect lending models.

In terms of enhanced user protection measures, first-time users must complete DAXA's online education and adaptability test. Loan limits are set between 30 million to 70 million Korean won, depending on trading experience. Users must be notified in advance of any forced liquidation risks and allowed to add collateral. The annual fee rate is capped at 20%, and exchanges must publicly disclose the lending status and liquidation cases for each cryptocurrency.

For market stability, the guidelines restrict lending targets to the top 20 market cap assets or those listed on at least three Korean won exchanges, excluding assets under trading warnings or suspected of abnormal trading. An internal control mechanism is required to prevent excessive concentration in specific cryptocurrencies, which could lead to market volatility.

data.title: 30 minutes ago, a whale donated 10 BTC to a Ukrainian address.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 30 minutes ago, a whale donated 10 BTC, equivalent to approximately US$1.108 million, to a Ukrainian-related address.

data.title: SEC Announces Shift in Crypto Regulatory Agenda
data.description:
SEC reveals new crypto regulatory agenda, proposing trading on national securities exchanges, safe harbors, reducing compliance burden.
source: https://coincu.com/360088-sec-crypto-regulatory-agenda

data.title: Pointsville Secures Series A Funding for Digital Asset Expansion
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, digital asset infrastructure company Pointsville has announced the completion of its Series A funding round. The round was led by Valor Capital Group, with participation from Tether, Superscrypt backed by Temasek, SNZ, Credit Saison, K2 Integrity, Citrino, and Dynamo. The specific amount raised has not been disclosed. The newly acquired funds are intended to support the company's efforts in asset digitization and transitioning to real-world asset (RWA) integration.

Tether is set to collaborate with Pointsville to provide the necessary support for integrating real-world assets and loyalty programs into the digital economy.

data.title: Thumzup Expands Cryptocurrency Investments and Mining Operations
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Thumzup, a media company partially owned by U.S. President Donald Trump's eldest son, has announced a significant investment in cryptocurrencies. The company has purchased $1 million worth of Bitcoin and its board has authorized further investments in various cryptocurrencies including DOGE, LTC, SOL, XRP, ETH, and USDC. Additionally, Thumzup plans to acquire 2,500 DOGE mining machines, with the possibility of purchasing an additional 1,000 machines in the future.

Previously, BlockBeats reported that on August 20, Thumzup agreed to acquire Dogehash Technologies through an all-stock transaction. Following the acquisition, the company will be renamed "Dogehash Technologies Holdings, Inc." and will trade on Nasdaq under the new ticker symbol "XDOG." This transaction is expected to be completed by the end of the year. Dogehash Technologies is partnered with mining machine manufacturer ElphaPex.

data.title: iSpecimen Inc. Evaluates Cryptocurrency Investment Proposals for $200 Million Treasury Plan
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, iSpecimen Inc., a biosample procurement company, is currently assessing investment proposals from several cryptocurrency firms to advance its $200 million crypto treasury initiative. The company is simultaneously progressing with a treasury project based on SOL, intending to purchase SOL through over-the-counter transactions, including acquiring locked SOL with transfer restrictions.

Robert Lim, CEO of iSpecimen Inc., noted that while acquiring locked SOL is appealing, the company is still exploring other opportunities. iSpecimen plans to adopt a buy-and-hold strategy to fund its crypto treasury through regular fundraising efforts and intends to stake SOL to generate returns.

data.title: Strike Founder Criticizes Ethereum's Potential to Surpass Bitcoin
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Strike founder Jack Mallers has dismissed Ethereum co-founder Joseph Lubin's view that Ethereum will surpass Bitcoin. Mallers described the notion as absurd, emphasizing that Bitcoin is revolutionizing the monetary market, which he considers a $500 trillion issue. He argued that Ethereum is merely a technology or, at best, an emerging tech company, making it incomparable to Bitcoin.

data.title: The Economic Engine
data.description:
"The Economic Engine" refers to the dynamic system that drives a nation's or region's financial growth, encompassing various sectors such as industry, services, and agriculture, while also highlighting the interplay of innovation, resources, and human capital that fuel productivity and prosperity within the economy. This metaphorical engine can be influenced by factors such as government policies, technological advancements, and global market conditions, all of which contribute to its overall efficiency and output.
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/09/05/the-economic-engine/

data.title: XRP News: Betting on XRP’s 2017-Style Gains in 2025 Could Be Risky, Onchain Data Shows
data.description: Key Takeaways:Unlike 2017, long-term XRP holders have already shifted from euphoria to doubt, signaling weaker conviction.The XRP/BTC pair remains 90% below its 2017 peak, stuck in a long-term distribution zone.Market conditions in 2025 differ sharply from 2017, making five-digit percentage gains unlikely.Analysts Compare 2025 to 2017 — But Conditions Have ChangedSeveral XRP analysts, including CRYPTOWZRD and JD, have drawn parallels between today’s XRP chart and the 2017 bull run. Back then, XRP consolidated inside a symmetrical triangle before breaking out, retesting support, and skyrocketing by more than 11,900% in under a year.Optimists say the current structure resembles that setup, with cycle targets as high as $20. However, broader onchain data and market structure suggest the backdrop in 2025 is far less favorable.Long-Term Holder Conviction Weaker Than 2017One of the clearest differences comes from Net Unrealized Profit/Loss (NUPL) data for long-term XRP holders.2017: Long-term holders remained in the Euphoria–Greed zone through most of the rally, showing strong conviction even as prices climbed.2025: Despite XRP’s gains this year, sentiment has already slipped back into the Belief–Denial phase — a stage where investors question whether the rally can last.This mirrors the setup from 2021, when doubt set in just before the market cooled, rather than the euphoric conviction that fueled the 2017 parabolic rally.XRP Still Weak Against BitcoinXRP’s performance relative to Bitcoin also highlights the weaker setup.In 2017, the XRP/BTC pair surged by 3,700%, hitting over 0.00023 BTC.In 2025, despite recovering to 0.000025 BTC from last year’s lows, the pair is still 90% below its 2017 peak.XRP is also facing stiff competition that it didn’t in 2017. Rivals like Ethereum, Solana, and Sui, along with stablecoins in the payments sector, now dominate narratives once unique to XRP.Why 2017’s Gains May Not RepeatWhile some chart patterns suggest XRP could rally higher, the onchain sentiment shift, weaker relative strength to Bitcoin, and increased competition make a repeat of 2017’s 11,900% surge unlikely.Instead, XRP’s trajectory may look closer to 2021’s market top, where excitement turned to hesitation before cooling off.For traders, that means risk remains high in betting on XRP to deliver outsized gains similar to its historic run.

data.title: Dogecoin News: Dogecoin Treasury Launch Sparks $1.40 Price Target as Analysts Eye 550% Rally
data.description: Key Takeaways:CleanCore Solutions launches the first $175M Dogecoin treasury, backed by 80+ institutional investors.DOGE’s weekly bullish megaphone pattern points to a potential rally toward $1–$1.40.ETF approval odds in 2025 and corporate adoption could unlock billions in inflows.Dogecoin’s First Treasury Marks Historic StepDogecoin (DOGE) rallied 10% off its monthly lows this week after CleanCore Solutions announced the launch of the first official Dogecoin treasury, valued at $175 million.The Nebraska-based company, known for aqueous ozone cleaning systems, disclosed the reserve in a private placement backed by more than 80 institutional and crypto-native investors. The initiative is supported by the Dogecoin Foundation and the House of DOGE, aiming to institutionalize DOGE as a treasury reserve asset.﻿The move mirrors corporate Bitcoin adoption strategies, such as MicroStrategy’s BTC program, and could accelerate regulated capital inflows into the Dogecoin ecosystem.Institutional Momentum and ETF DemandAnalysts highlight the treasury launch as a turning point that could legitimize Dogecoin in traditional finance. Demand could grow further if a Dogecoin ETF is approved in the U.S. Polymarket data puts the probability of approval in 2025 at 79%, while the 21Shares Dogecoin ETP is already trading in Europe.If sustained, such institutional and ETF-driven demand could justify a $1 price target by late 2025.﻿Technical Outlook: $1.40 in PlayOn the weekly chart, Dogecoin trades within a bullish megaphone pattern, bouncing from its $0.15 June low. Analysts note that each rally within this formation has historically exceeded the last.Primary target: $1.00 by Q4 2025.Extended target: $1.40, representing a 550% surge from current levels.Crypto strategist Bitcoinsensus noted:“This next wave could potentially lead to prices as high as $1.40.”On the daily chart, DOGE is consolidating inside a symmetric triangle. A breakout above resistance at $0.225 (aligned with the 50-day SMA) could trigger a measured move to $0.37, marking a 72% advance.﻿With the first treasury-backed initiative, growing ETF speculation, and bullish technicals, Dogecoin’s “next wave” could be its most important yet. However, resistance levels near $0.225 and macro risk sentiment will determine whether DOGE truly begins its climb toward $1 and beyond.

data.title: "Big Brother Maji" opened a long position on WLFI for the first time, with an opening price of $0.1822
data.description: According to on-chain data analyst Ai Yi, "Big Brother Maji" has opened a long position in WLFI for the first time. After Justin Sun's address was blacklisted early this morning, he opened a 5x long position in WLFI. He currently holds 10 million WLFI (US$1.82 million) at an opening price of $0.1822.

data.title: Hong Kong Firm Plans Major Investment in Quantum Company
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Hong Kong-listed company Ying Universe (stock code 03700) has announced its intention to purchase 168.5 million shares of Guofu Quantum at a price of HKD 1.78 per share.

Previously, Foresight News reported that Guofu Quantum Innovation Co., Ltd., through its subsidiary Fuqiang Equity Investment Management Co., Ltd., established the 'Guofu Tokenized Digital Asset Limited Partnership Fund' (RWA8 Fund).

data.title: Ethereum Flipping Bitcoin Is Just ‘Ridiculous’
data.description:
Last week, Ethereum cofounder and ConsenSys CEO Joseph Lubin took to Twitter to comment on an interview with Tom Lee, whose company BitMine (the MicroStrategy of Ethereum) is now the largest holder of ETH, with 1. 86 million coins.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/09/04/ethereum-flipping-bitcoin-is-just-ridiculous/

data.title: Crypto-friendly bank Lead Bank completes $70 million financing round, led by a16z and others
data.description: Crypto-friendly bank Lead Bank has raised $70 million at a $1.47 billion valuation. A16z and Khosla Ventures led the round, with participation from existing investors Ribbit Capital, Coatue, and Zeev Ventures, as well as new investors Iconiq Capital and Greycroft. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Ukraine Receives Bitcoin Transfer Worth Over $1 Million
data.description: According to Foresight News, Whale Alert has detected a transaction involving a Ukraine-related address receiving 10 bitcoins approximately 10 minutes ago. The value of this transfer is estimated to be around $1.108 million.
